metadata.title: Czech Republic EOR Services | Employer of Record Czech Republic – Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Czech Republic EOR and Employer of Record Czech Republic services. Hire employees in Czech Republic without entity. Czech employment laws 2026, Czech payroll outsourcing, social security compliance, visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in Czech Republic without entity

faqs.title: Czech Republic EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in Czech Republic.

items.question: How much does Czech Republic EOR cost?
items.answer: Czech Republic EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus the cost of salary, benefits, employer social security contributions (ČSSZ), health insurance, and taxes. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Total cost depends on headcount, salary levels, and benefits. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in Czech Republic with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank Czech Republic EOR, you can onboard new hires in 2–3 business days once we have signed contracts and employee details. No local entity (s.r.o./a.s.) is required, so you avoid months of setup time.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in Czech Republic without an entity?
items.answer: When you use a compliant Czech Republic EOR like Jackson & Frank, the EOR is the legal employer in Czech Republic. They assume employment law, social security (ČSSZ), tax, and compliance risk. You avoid misclassification, permanent establishment, and local registration issues as long as you work with a licensed, established provider.

items.question: What type of employment contract does Czech Republic EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are hired under a Czech employment contract (pracovní smlouva) compliant with Czech law, including notice periods, probation (zkušební doba), vacation entitlement, and mandatory social security contributions. Jackson & Frank issues the contract from our Czech entity so it is fully local and enforceable.

items.question: Can you sponsor visas for Czech Republic EOR employees?
items.answer: Yes. We support visa sponsorship and the Employee Card (zaměstnanecká karta) and EU Blue Card programs in Czech Republic, plus coordination with Czech Labor Office and immigration authorities, so you can hire non-EU talent through our Czech Republic EOR.
